content.title: Type 'LineOfBusiness' failed to compile
content.message:
The node type 'FutuRe/AmericasIns/LineOfBusiness' was parked after a compile failure and will not be retried until its source is fixed. Compilation failed: Compilation failed for 'FutuRe/AmericasIns/LineOfBusiness':
CS0246 Error (line 59): The type or namespace name 'LineOfBusiness' could not be found (are you missing a using directive or an assembly reference?)
CS1061 Error (line 62): 'LayoutDefinition' does not contain a definition for 'AddLineOfBusinessLayoutAreas' and no accessible extension method 'AddLineOfBusinessLayoutAreas' accepting a first argument of type 'LayoutDefinition' could be found (are you missing a using dir …
